compiled_state.title: Orphan Chrome processes accumulate during project workflow
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: Severe, chronic problem with orphan Chrome/chrome processes accumulating during workflow execution. Previous investigations erroneously concluded the problem was not caused by this project. User has confirmed repeated occurrence.

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 7 (ADVANCED). Severity=2, Complexity=2, Environment=0, Intermittent=1, Prior-fix-attempts=+2. User reports previous investigations erroneously dismissed the issue.
comments.author: Test
